title: Prosthodontists
description: Diagnose, treat, rehabilitate, design, and fit prostheses that maintain oral function, health, and appearance for patients with clinical conditions associated with teeth, oral and maxillofacial tissues, or the jaw.

tasks.text: Examine patients to diagnose oral health conditions and diseases.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Fit prostheses to patients, making any necessary adjustments and modifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Replace missing teeth and associated oral structures with permanent fixtures, such as implant-supported prostheses, crowns and bridges, or removable fixtures, such as dentures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure and take impressions of patients' jaws and teeth to determine the shape and size of dental prostheses, using face bows, dental articulators, recording devices, and other materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collaborate with general dentists, specialists, and other health professionals to develop solutions to dental and oral health concerns.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design and fabricate dental prostheses, or supervise dental technicians and laboratory bench workers who construct the devices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Restore function and aesthetics to traumatic injury survivors, or to individuals with diseases or congenital disabilities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Use bonding technology on the surface of the teeth to change tooth shape or to close gaps.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Treat facial pain and jaw joint problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Place veneers onto teeth to conceal defects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Bleach discolored teeth to brighten and whiten them.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
